title: neomammillaria polycentra
intro: Neomammillaria polycentra, also known as the Mammillaria polycentra, is a species of cactus native to Mexico, characterized by its distinctive, star-shaped flowers and short, white spines. Traditionally, Neomammillaria polycentra has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Neomammillaria polycentra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
